records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Maḥbūb b. Ḥukaym
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 10 – Maḥbūb b. Ḥukaym.  He narrated the book “Innā anzalnāhu” from ʿUmar b. Tawba.  We do not recognize him.
records.arabicText: 10 - محبوب بن حكيم. روى عن عمر بن توبة " كتاب إنا أنزلناه ". ولا نعرفه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Mūsā b. Janjawayh, Abū ʿImrān, al-Urmanī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 11 – Mūsā b. Janjawayh, Abū ʿImrān, al-Urmanī.  Weak.  He has a book.
records.arabicText: 11 - موسى بن زنجويه، أبو عمران، الأرمني. ضعيف. له كتاب.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Sulaymān b. Zakariyya, al-Daylamī, Abū ʿAbdillāh
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 12 – Muḥammad b. Sulaymān b. Zakariyya, al-Daylamī, Abū ʿAbdillāh. Weak (in his ḥadīth, a proponent of irtifāʿ in his madhhab, he is not turned to.)
records.arabicText: 12 - محمد بن سليمان بن زكريا، الديلمي، أبو عبد الله. ضعيف (في حديثه، مرتفع في مذهبه، لا يلتفت إليه).

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Muṣādif
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 13 – Muḥammad b. Muṣādif, client of Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  He narrated from his father, weak.
records.arabicText: 13 - محمد بن مصادف، مولى أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). روى عن أبيه، ضعيف.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Furāt b. Aḥnaf
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 14 – Muḥammad b. Furāt b. Aḥnaf.  He narrated from his father, from Abū Jaʿfar  عليه السلام and Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Weak son of a weak.  His ḥadīth are not to be written.
records.arabicText: 14 - محمد بن فرات بن أحنف. روى عن أبيه، عن أبي جعفر وأبي عبد الله (عليهما السلام). ضعيف ابن ضعيف، لا يكتب حديثه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Sinān, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Hamdānī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 15 – Muḥammad b. Sinān, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Hamdānī, their client – this is the most correct of what he is related to.  Weak, a ghālī, he fabricates (ḥadīth).  He is not turned to.
records.arabicText: 15 - محمد بن سنان، أبو جعفر، الهمداني، مولاهم - هذا أصح ما ينتسب إليه -. ضعيف، غال، يضع (الحديث) لا يلتفت إليه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Jumhūr, Abū ʿAbdillāh
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 16 – Muḥammad b. Jumhūr, Abū ʿAbdillāh, the blind.  A ghālī, corrupt in ḥadīth, his ḥadīth are not to be written.  I saw that he has a poem wherein he deems lawful the prohibitions of God O .عزO وجل
records.arabicText: 16 - محمد بن جمهور، أبو عبد الله، العمي. غال، فاسد الحديث، لا يكتب حديثه. رأيت له شعرا يحلل فيه محرمات الله عز وجل.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Khālid al-Barqī b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlī, Abū ʿAbdillāh
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 17 – Muḥammad b. Khālid al-Barqī b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, client of Jarīr b. ʿAbdullāh.  His ḥadīth are recognized and denied.  He narrates a lot from the weak (narrators) and relies on the mursal traditions.
records.arabicText: 17 - محمد بن خالد، البرقي بن عبد الرحمان بن محمد بن علي، أبو عبد الله، مولى جرير بن عبد الله. حديثه يعرف وينكر. يروي عن الضعفاء كثيرا ويعتمد المراسيل.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Awrama, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qummī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 18 – Muḥammad b. Awrama, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qummī.  The Qummis accused him of ghulw, but his ḥadīth are pure, there is no corruption in them.  I have not seen anything attributed to him that confounds the soul, except for pages in Tafsīr al-Bāṭin and what befits its ḥadīth, and I suspect it is a forgery upon him.   I saw a writing that came out from Abū al-Ḥasan ʿAlī b. Muḥammad  عليه السلام to the Qummis regarding his disassociation (barā’a) from what they defamed him by [and deemed good his beliefs and the nearness] of his station.  Al-Ḥasan b. Muḥammad b. Bundar al-Qummī رضي اP عنه has narrated to me, he said: I heard my elders sayings: When (the accusation of) ghulw was lunged against Muḥammad b. Awrma, the Ashāʿira agreed upon killing him, but they found him praying at night from its beginning to its end, numerous nights, so they halted from their belief.
records.arabicText: 18 - محمد بن أورمة، أبو جعفر، القمي. اتهمه القميون بالغلو، وحديثه نقي لا فساد فيه، وما رأيت شيئا ينسب إليه تضطرب فيه النفس، إلا أوراقا في " تفسير الباطن " وما يليق بحديثه، وأظنها موضوعة عليه. ورأيت " كتابا " خرج من أبي الحسن، علي بن محمد (عليهما السلام) إلى القميين في براءته مما قذف به (وحسن عقيدته، وقرب) منزلته. وقد حدثني الحسن بن محمد بن بندار، القمي (رحمه الله) قال: سمعت مشايخي يقولون: إن محمد بن أورمة لما طعن عليه بالغلو (اتفقت) الأشاعرة ليقتلوه، فوجدوه يصلي الليل من أوله إلى آخره، ليالي عديدة، فتوقفوا عن اعتقادهم.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm b. Muḥammad al-Ṣayrafī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 19 – Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm b. Muḥammad al-Ṣayrafī – the son of the sister of Khallād – Abū Jaʿfar, who had the laqab of Abū Samīna.  Kufan.  A liar, a ghālī.  He entered Qum and his affair became famous in it, and Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. ʿĪsā al-Ashʿarī رضي اP عنه expelled him from it.  He was renowned in irtifāʿ, he is not turned to, and his ḥadīth are not to be written.
records.arabicText: 19 - محمد بن علي بن إبراهيم بن محمد، الصيرفي - ابن أخت خلاد، المقرئ - أبو جعفر، الملقب بأبي سمينة، كوفي. كذاب، غال. دخل قم واشتهر أمره بها، ونفاه أحمد بن محمد بن عيسى الأشعري (رحمه الله) عنها. وكان شهيرا في الارتفاع، لا يلتفت إليه، ولا يكتب حديثه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 20 – Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Jaʿfar. His father had a connection to Abū al-Ḥasan  عليه السلام . His ḥadīth are recognized and denied. He narrates from the weak narrators a lot, and relies on the mursal narrations.
records.arabicText: 20 - محمد بن علي بن إبراهيم، الهمذاني، أبو جعفر. كانت لأبيه وصلة بأبي الحسن (عليه السلام). وحديثه يعرف وينكر. ويروي عن الضعفاء كثيرا، ويعتمد المراسيل.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Mūsā b. ʿĪsā, al-Sammān (the butter merchant), Abū Jaʿfar, al-Hamdānī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 21 – Muḥammad b. Mūsā b. ʿĪsā, al-Sammān (the butter merchant), Abū Jaʿfar, al-Hamdānī.  Weak, he narrates from the weak narrators, and it is permissible for him to be brought out as a witness.  The Qummis spoke of him with reprobation, doing so for much (?), and they excluded what he narrated from the book “Nawādir al-Ḥikma”.
records.arabicText: 21 - محمد بن موسى بن عيسى، السمان، أبو جعفر، الهمداني. ضعيف، ويروي عن الضعفاء، ويجوز أن يخرج شاهدا. تكلم القميون فيه بالرد، فأكثروا، واستثنوا من كتاب " نوادر الحكمة " ما رواه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Shammūn, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 22 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Shammūn, Abū Jaʿfar, his origin was Basran.  A wāqifī, then he became a ghālī.  Weak, collapsed, he is not turned to nor is his writings and the rest of what is attributed to him.
records.arabicText: 22 - محمد بن الحسن بن شمون، أبو جعفر، أصله بصري. واقف، ثم غلا، ضعيف، متهافت، لا يلتفت إليه، ولا إلى مصنفاته، وسائر ما ينسب إليه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Ḥassān, al-Rāzī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 23 – Muḥammad b. Ḥassān, al-Rāzī, Abū Jaʿfar.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 23 - محمد بن حسان، الرازي، أبو جعفر. ضعيف.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Mihrān, al-Karkhī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 24 – Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Mihrān, al-Karkhī, Abū Jaʿfar.  A ghālī, weak, a liar. He has a book regarding the notables and the defamed that gives evidence upon his filth and his lying.
records.arabicText: 24 - محمد بن عبد الله بن مهران، الكرخي، أبو جعفر. غال، ضعيف، كذاب. له كتاب في الممدوحين والمذمومين يدل على خبثه وكذبه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 25 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar.  Kufan.  A ghālī, weak, he is not turned to.
records.arabicText: 25 - محمد بن الحسن بن سعيد، الصائغ، أبو جعفر، كوفي. غال، ضعيف، لا يلتفت إليه.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 26 – al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad.  His ḥadīth are recognized and denied.  He narrates from the weak narrators. It is permissible for him to be brought out as a witness.
records.arabicText: 26 - المعلى بن محمد، البصري، أبو محمد. يعرف حديثه، وينكر. ويروي عن الضعفاء ويجوز أن يخرج شاهدا.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 27 – Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī.  He narrates from his father, in his ḥadīth there is weakness.
records.arabicText: 27 - محمد بن سالم بن أبي سلمة، الكندي، السجستاني. يروي عن أبيه، في حديثه ضعف.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 28 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī, who had the laqab of “Ḥamdān”.  Kufan.  Weak.  He narrates from the weak narrators.
records.arabicText: 28 - محمد بن أحمد بن خاقان، النهدي، أبو جعفر، القلانسي، الملقب " حمدان "، كوفي. ضعيف. يروي عن الضعفاء.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 29 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī.  The Qummis weakened him, and they excluded what he narrated from the book “Nawādir al-Ḥikma”.  In his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.
records.arabicText: 29 - محمد بن أحمد، الجاموراني، أبو عبد الله، الرازي. ضعفه القميون، واستثنوا من كتاب " نوادر الحكمة " ما رواه. وفي مذهبه ارتفاع.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muʿallā b. Rāshid
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 30 – Muʿallā b. Rāshid, the blind.  Basran.  Weak.  ā ghālī.
records.arabicText: 30 - معلى بن راشد، العمي، بصري. ضعيف، غال.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 31 – Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar, the one who is known as the possessor of the hermitage.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 31 - محمد بن إسماعيل بن أحمد بن بشير، البرمكي، أبو جعفر، المعروف بصاحب الصومعة. ضعيف.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 32 – Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī.  Weak, in his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.
records.arabicText: 32 - محمد بن بحر، الرهنى، الشيباني، أبو الحسين، النرماشيري. ضعيف، في مذهبه ارتفاع.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 33 – Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī.  Abū Jaʿfar b. Bābawayh narrated from him.  Weak, a liar.  He narrated a tafsīr from him that he narrated from two unknown men: one of them known as Yūsuf b. Muḥammad b. Ziyād, and the other: ʿAlī b. Muḥammad b. Yasār, from their father from Abū al-Ḥasan the Third  عليه السلام .  The tafsīr is fabricated from Sahl alDībājī from his father with ḥadīths from these reprobates.
records.arabicText: 33 - محمد بن القاسم، المفسر، الإسترآبادي. روى عنه أبو جعفر ابن بابويه. ضعيف، كذاب. روى عنه تفسيرا يرويه عن رجلين مجهولين: أحدهما يعرف بيوسف بن محمد بن زياد، والآخر: علي بن محمد بن يسار عن أبيهما، عن أبي الحسن الثالث (عليه السلام). والتفسير موضوع عن سهل الديباجي، عن أبيه بأحاديث من هذه المناكير.

records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 34 – Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal.  A fabricator, (he narrated) much that is denied.  I saw his books and in them are isnads without texts and texts without isnads.  I regard (that one must) abandon what he exclusively (narrates).
records.arabicText: 34 - محمد بن عبد الله بن محمد بن المطلب، الشيباني، أبو المفضل. وضاع، كثير المناكير. رأيت كتبه، وفيها الأسانيد من دون المتون، والمتون من دون الأسانيد. وأرى ترك ما ينفرد به.
